title: Trump tells Netanyahu not to retaliate: 'I call the shots. I call all the shots.' — says US-Iran deal 'very close'
snippet: Trump told Financial Times that Netanyahu 'won't have any choice' but to accept the US-Iran deal. 'I call the shots. I call all the shots.' He called Netanyahu 'right now' to tell him not to retaliate for Iran's missile attacks. Told Axios further action could jeopardize ongoing negotiations. Said 'We are very close to a final deal with Iran. It is going to be a good deal.' On NBC Meet the Press: Iran hasn't agreed because 'they're strong, proud' but 'have no choice.' Multiple outlets: Times of Israel, FT, Axios, Newsmax, JPost, i24NEWS, NBC News, AA.
tag_reason: New statement: Trump explicitly orders Netanyahu not to retaliate and claims full control over situation; unprecedented 'I call all the shots' language
